title: Collection
intro: Collection is one of the **most important long-term systems** in Kairos. As your character progresses through gear tiers you will need to continuously revisit the Collection system — farming materials from multiple zones, enchanting specific items, and completing sets to earn permanent stat boosts that compound over time.

figure.alt: Weapon Collections panel showing Dragon Sword entries
figure.caption: The Weapon Collections panel — each entry requires specific items, some with enchant requirements.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
steps: Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) and select **Collection**.
Browse the categories — Weapons, Armors, Jewels, and more.
Click **View** on any entry to see the required items and enchant levels.
Farm and enchant the required materials, then submit them to complete the collection.
Every **5 completed collections** the system levels up and grants a passive stat boost.

cells: System level-up + permanent passive stat improvement
Counts toward the next level-up milestone

tables.title: Categories
tables.preText: Collections are grouped by item type. You will need to farm materials across **multiple zones** as you progress:

cells: Weapons at various enchant levels from different gear tiers
Armor pieces and sets, some requiring enchantment
Accessories and jewelry from progressive zones

infoBoxes.label: Don't Rush
infoBoxes.body: Do not try to complete collections all at once early on — the material and enchant requirements scale with gear tier. Progress collections naturally as you upgrade your equipment. Each new gear tier will unlock new collection entries requiring better-enchanted versions of the items you're already using.

infoBoxes.label: Long-Term Strategy
infoBoxes.body: Treat Collection as a permanent side activity — every time you upgrade a piece of gear, check if the old version (possibly enchanted) completes a collection entry before discarding it. The passive stat bonuses add up significantly over hundreds of completed entries.
